'''zovapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zombified|zombified]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-v-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zombified|zombified]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zovapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zovapithi|zovapithi]] || [[word:zovapiji|zovapiji]] || [[word:zovapishi|zovapishi]] || [[word:zovapiki|zovapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zovaputhuthu|zovaputhuthu]] || [[word:zovapujuju|zovapujuju]] || [[word:zovapushushu|zovapushushu]] || [[word:zovapukuku|zovapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zovaputhu|zovaputhu]] || [[word:zovapuju|zovapuju]] || [[word:zovapushu|zovapushu]] || [[word:zovapuku|zovapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zovapufthuf|zovapufthuf]] || [[word:zovapufjuf|zovapufjuf]] || [[word:zovapufshuf|zovapufshuf]] || [[word:zovapufkuf|zovapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zovapethe|zovapethe]] || [[word:zovapeje|zovapeje]] || [[word:zovapeshe|zovapeshe]] || [[word:zovapeke|zovapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zovapothotho|zovapothotho]] || [[word:zovapojojo|zovapojojo]] || [[word:zovaposhosho|zovaposhosho]] || [[word:zovapokoko|zovapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zovapotho|zovapotho]] || [[word:zovapojo|zovapojo]] || [[word:zovaposho|zovaposho]] || [[word:zovapoko|zovapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zovapofthof|zovapofthof]] || [[word:zovapofjof|zovapofjof]] || [[word:zovapofshof|zovapofshof]] || [[word:zovapofkof|zovapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zovapÃŸfthÃŸf|zovapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zovapÃŸfjÃŸf|zovapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zovapÃŸfshÃŸf|zovapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zovapÃŸfkÃŸf|zovapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zovapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|zovapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zovapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|zovapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zovapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|zovapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zovapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|zovapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zovapÃŸfthÃŸf|zovapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zovapÃŸfjÃŸf|zovapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zovapÃŸfshÃŸf|zovapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zovapÃŸfkÃŸf|zovapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zovapÃŸfthÃŸf|zovapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zovapÃŸfjÃŸf|zovapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zovapÃŸfshÃŸf|zovapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zovapÃŸfkÃŸf|zovapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zovapÃḊthÃḊ|zovapÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:zovapÃḊjÃḊ|zovapÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:zovapÃḊshÃḊ|zovapÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:zovapÃḊkÃḊ|zovapÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zovapathatha|zovapathatha]] || [[word:zovapajaja|zovapajaja]] || [[word:zovapashasha|zovapashasha]] || [[word:zovapakaka|zovapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zovapatha|zovapatha]] || [[word:zovapaja|zovapaja]] || [[word:zovapasha|zovapasha]] || [[word:zovapaka|zovapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zovapafthaf|zovapafthaf]] || [[word:zovapafjaf|zovapafjaf]] || [[word:zovapafshaf|zovapafshaf]] || [[word:zovapafkaf|zovapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zovapasha|zovapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zovapshÃḋsha|zovapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zovaprosha|zovaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zovapmusha|zovapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zovapyasha|zovapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozovapnkshÃḋsha|gozovapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozovapnkrosha|gozovapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozovapnkmusha|gozovapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozovapnkyasha|gozovapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zovavapasha|zovavapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zovavapshÃḋsha|zovavapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zovavaprosha|zovavaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zovavapmusha|zovavapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zovavapyasha|zovavapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozovavapnkshÃḋsha|gozovavapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozovavapnkrosha|gozovavapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozovavapnkmusha|gozovavapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozovavapnkyasha|gozovavapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zevÃḊpasha|zevÃḊpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zevÃḊpshÃḋsha|zevÃḊpshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zevÃḊprosha|zevÃḊprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zevÃḊpmusha|zevÃḊpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zevÃḊpyasha|zevÃḊpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozevÃḊpnkshÃḋsha|gozevÃḊpnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozevÃḊpnkrosha|gozevÃḊpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozevÃḊpnkmusha|gozevÃḊpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozevÃḊpnkyasha|gozevÃḊpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zovfapasha|zovfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zovfapshÃḋsha|zovfapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zovfaprosha|zovfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zovfapmusha|zovfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zovfapyasha|zovfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozovfapnkshÃḋsha|gozovfapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozovfapnkrosha|gozovfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozovfapnkmusha|gozovfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozovfapnkyasha|gozovfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
